content:
Just now

--

We’ve been busy creating a stunning trophy design for the NSW AI Awards, which is the final event of NSW AI Bonanza 2026.
The awards are open to both Australian and Global submissions. Our website https://nswaibonanza.com has all the creative AI and technical AI submission links.
The in-person awards in Sydney, Australia will be streamed for those unable to make it on 25th September. We can’t wait to tell you about the stunning venue that will be using! We hope to see you in September celebrating the incredible finalists and award winners.
